code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or safety hazards
    - Complete failure/defects with warnings against purchase
    - Multiple unresolved issues overriding any positives →1
    - Critical failure during first use despite proper handling →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but with critical flaws affecting regular use
    - Requires significant workarounds negating core value →2
    - Products failing prematurely despite proper care →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with explicit compromises
    - Temporary solutions with clear limitations →3
    - Conflicted tone where satisfaction = dissatisfaction →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Satisfaction with SPECIFIC limitations requiring adaptation
    - Material tradeoffs (thinness/fading) despite functionality
    - Requires complementary products for full functionality →4
    - Praise focused on aesthetics with core functionality limits →4
    - "Great for [X] but not [Y]" patterns with explicit boundaries →4
    - Continued use of alternatives for specific scenarios →4
    - NEW: Physical/usage constraints limiting intended purpose →4
    - NEW: Version comparisons favoring competitors while recommending →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unqualified recommendation despite inherent characteristics
    - Long-term validation through sustained daily use →5
    - Inherited product traits (e.g., cotton wrinkling) accepted →5
    - Direct competitor comparisons showing sustained preference →5
    - Resolved minor issues with no functional impact →5
    - NEW: Core functionality remains uncompromised despite secondary limits →5
    - NEW: Transformative impact in primary use case outweighs all else →5

    EDGE CASE CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Avoid..." constraints →4 | "Works best when..." →5
    - Core limitation →4 | Inherited trait →5
    - Partial solution →4 | Complete solution →5
    - Price concerns with satisfaction →4 | Price justified by value →5
    - Comparative criticism ("worse than X") →4 | Comparative preference ("choose over X") →5
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (Gold 5):
Review: "This cotton tablecloth wrinkles but that's expected. Washes well and looks beautiful!"
Rating: 5

Example 2 (Gold 4):
Review: "Stasher bags perfect if you don't overfill! Still use Ziplocs for liquids."
Rating: 4

Example 3 (Gold 5):
Review: "UPDATE: 2 years daily use. Minor handle discoloration but still my favorite!"
Rating: 5

Example 4 (Gold 4):
Review: "Vibrant color transforms any room! Thinner than premium brands - use blackout curtains behind."
Rating: 4

Example 5 (Gold 5):
Review: "Not quite Lodge but my daily driver. Closest I've found to cast iron performance!"
Rating: 5

Example 6 (Gold 4):
Review: "Great containers if avoiding microwaves. Need plastic lids for freezer storage."
Rating: 4

Example 7 (Gold 5):
Review: "Pyrex set: Rectangular ones broke but round ones perfect! Worth it for these alone."
Rating: 5

Example 8 (Gold 1):
Review: "Dangerous defect - sparked during first use. Immediate return."
Rating: 1

Example 9 (Gold 5):
Review: "Makes perfect coffee once you learn its quirks. Replaced my $300 machine!"
Rating: 5

Example 10 (Gold 4):
Review: "Love these baskets! Wish they were sturdier but use daily with light items."
Rating: 4

Example 11 (Gold 5):
Review: "Sharp tablecloth needs ironing - expected with cotton. Colors stay vibrant for years!"
Rating: 5

Example 12 (Gold 4):
Review: "Initially smelled plasticky (gone after wash). Thinner material than photos show."
Rating: 4

Example 13 (Gold 5):
Review: "While Brand X lasts longer, this gives perfect daily results with easier cleanup!"
Rating: 5

Example 14 (Gold 3):
Review: "Adequate storage but lids warp. Temporary solution until better options."
Rating: 3

Example 15 (Gold 2):
Review: "Handle broke in 2 days. Functional but painful to grip properly."
Rating: 2

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (27 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 15
  gold 5 -> 4: 8
  gold 4 -> 3: 1
  gold 3 -> 4: 1
  gold 3 -> 2: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "Between a puppy and frequent visits from children, I've definitely had times when it felt like the gap between proper carpet cleanings was entirely too long. On the other hand, I never entirely bought the idea that a device of this type could turn ou..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "On my computer screen the color for the 'cool brown' bath mat is accurate.  It's a faded sort of brown with lots of gray tint to it.  Our upstairs bath is in browns -- golden-hue brown and tile brown-- and it fits in.

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This is a coffee pot for coffee geeks.  Most discerning coffee aficionados likely wouldn't notice much if any difference from a a great less complicated coffee make, such as a Bonavita.  To cut to the point, this probably isn't for you, but who knows..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "I bought this for vacations, not paying enough attention to the description. I thought it was just a fancier version of the small one that people buy for travel or if there is only one person using it. So when it got here I was a bit taken aback at h..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Since buying this product and it dying 12 months later I've owned numerous carpet cleaners including the Bissel Proheat 2X Pet Lift Off and the at-home version of the Rug Doctor. Both of these blew the performance of this machine out of the water. Th..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 4, 2] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "I bought one of those Pyrex sets a few years ago.  You know, the one that came with the blue lids and some of the containers were rectangular --large and small-- while others were round (like these).  Well, turns out that the ones I used the most wer..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 27 errors, 13 borderline out of 54 examples."}
